name: buzzassist
description: BuzzAssist MCP canvas and media tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use BuzzAssist MCP canvas and media tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: BuzzAssist bundles a project-local Excalidraw browser canvas, stdio MCP tools, and an optional token-protected local HTTP MCP endpoint discovered through canvas/.server.json. Tool calls update the same browser canvas and can draw diagrams, read selections, insert assets, and run image, video, subtitle, and silence-cut workflows.
defaultPrompt: Open the BuzzAssist canvas for this project.
Use read_me and create_view to draw into the live BuzzAssist canvas.
Generate a new image into the selected Excalidraw AI holder.
